data.body: FIX VALIDATED. After landing the job-level-env fix (change 681, merged), I re-dispatched the canary (GitHub Actions run 29348602347) with dry_run=false. It used the fixed workflow (REBAR_IDENTITY_SIGNING_KEY=/home/runner/work/_temp/rebar-bot-signing-key now present in EVERY step's env, not just materialize) and created ticket f436-fac8-382f-47ec (binding-drift alert). That CREATE event is SIGNED: author_id=594c-9dcf-5ad6-4e6d, author_sig present, and rebar authorship verify_event_authorship reports VERIFIED against the bot identity. So CI ticket writes are now signed+attributed+verifiable (was: attributed-but-unsigned). make lint clean; the change is YAML-only (no code/tests affected).
